## Source: amazon-inspector (8e9459ef3208e8a07fbb99a80ce6bc5f0a6b9c6511da51241bac7c034632b7e1)
The package process-app-task was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (464df190f00fb85159cdf06dd3be62960f2d33206ba14f2bb1ad047053dc4027)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'process-app-task' @ 1.0.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
